name: at-home zero-point energy

phase_0.boundary_condition: The hermetic seal of the domestic energy manifold that contains the extraction loop and bounds the local spacetime topology.

VINIT.justification: The unbounded zero-point field before any extraction, boundary, or domestic intent is imposed.

TANCH.justification: The terminal anchor and hermetic seal of the home's energy grid that contains and bounds the entire system.

AFWD.justification: The forward morphism driving extractable photons from the Casimir cavity into the domestic grid.

AREV.justification: The reverse descent of vacuum polarization that stabilizes the cavity against collapse, returning energy to the vacuum.

CLINK.justification: The sequential chaining of extraction and stabilization within the resonant metamaterial lattice.

IMSCRIB.justification: The self-referential loop where the meter models its own consumption state to regulate the extraction rate.

FSPLIT.justification: The co-multiplication splitting the vacuum state into extractable modes (T-arm) and sub-threshold virtual pairs (F-arm).

FFUSE.justification: The multiplication recombining extractable modes and virtual pairs to perfectly restore the vacuum state.

EVALT.justification: The affirmative evaluation where usable power successfully flows to the home without cavity failure.

EVALF.justification: The negative evaluation where vacuum back-reaction threatens to overwhelm and collapse the extraction mechanism.

ENGAGR.justification: The paradice of the vacuum: simultaneously empty of real particles and infinitely dense with zero-point energy, held without resolution.

IFIX.justification: The permanent, append-only record of energy harvested, phase shifts, and system state.

phase_3.void_description: The unbounded quantum vacuum, devoid of extractable gradients, domestic boundaries, or measurement.
phase_3.true_description: The domestic grid is charged; usable power flows continuously without cavity collapse.
phase_3.false_description: The Casimir cavity fails; vacuum back-reaction overwhelms the extraction mechanism.
phase_3.both_description: The zero-point paradox: the vacuum is simultaneously empty of real particles and infinitely dense with zero-point energy.

steps.domain_action: quantum_vacuum — The unbounded zero-point field before any extraction or boundary is imposed.
domestic_manifold — The hermetic seal of the home's energy grid that contains and bounds the system.
smart_meter_feedback — The self-referential loop where the meter models its own consumption to regulate extraction.
vacuum_bifurcation — The splitting of the vacuum state into extractable modes (T-arm) and sub-threshold virtual pairs (F-arm).
mode_extraction — The forward flow of extractable photons from the cavity into the domestic grid.
grid_charged — The affirmative state where usable power successfully flows to the home.
metamaterial_composition — The sequential chaining of extraction and stabilization within the resonant lattice.
vacuum_backreaction — The reverse descent of vacuum polarization that stabilizes the cavity against collapse.
cavity_failure — The negative state where vacuum back-reaction threatens to collapse the extraction.
zero_point_paradox — The paradice of the vacuum: simultaneously empty of real particles and infinitely dense with energy.
vacuum_restoration — The recombination of extractable modes and virtual pairs to restore the vacuum state.
immutable_ledger — The permanent, append-only record of energy harvested and system state.
domestic_manifold — The hermetic seal of the home's energy grid that contains and bounds the system.

phase_5.compiler_frontend: The metamaterial lattice design that translates vacuum boundary conditions into extractable modes.
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: Quantum entanglement and phonon coupling across the Casimir cavity.
phase_5.memory_mechanism: The superconducting quantum interference device (SQUID) array storing the phase history of the vacuum fluctuations.
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: The resonant frequency tuner that synchronizes the cavity oscillation with the domestic grid's demand.
phase_5.alfs_store: The canonical reference of the cosmological constant and local spacetime topology.

phase_6.cycle_cost: Zero net energy consumed from the domestic grid; the work is done by the vacuum topology.
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: The vacuum state in equilibrium with the unpowered Casimir cavity.
phase_6.post_cycle_state: The vacuum state in equilibrium with the powered cavity, having yielded usable work to the grid.
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — The extraction is a topological read of the vacuum's zero-point invariant; no information is erased, only the boundary conditions are shifted.

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → TANCH → IMSCRIB → FSPLIT → AFWD → EVALT → CLINK → AREV → EVALF → ENGAGR → FFUSE → IFIX → TANCH
-- Class: at-home zero-point energy
-- Fingerprint: sig=(7,2,3,1)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=13
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(3, 10)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑡  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑼 → 𐑠  | terminal object — connectivity boundary
--   [2] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑡 → 𐑚  | identity — self-imscription
--   [3] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [4] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑚 → 𐑙  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [5] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [6] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑚 → 𐑙  | composition — regime coherence
--   [7] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑚 → 𐑙  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [8] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [9] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑚 → 𐑙  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [10] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑭  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [11] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑙 → 𐑡  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [12] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑭 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def at_home_zero_point_energy_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑡)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (quantum_vacuum — The unbounded zero-point field before any extraction or boun...)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑼 𐑠)  -- [1] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (domestic_manifold — The hermetic seal of the home's energy grid that contains...)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑡 𐑚)  -- [2] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (smart_meter_feedback — The self-referential loop where the meter models its o...)
  -- FSPLIT [3] (gran := 𐑚) (vacuum_bifurcation — The splitting of the vacuum state into extractable modes (T-arm) and sub-threshold virtual pairs (F-arm).) / FFUSE [10] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (4 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑾 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [4] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (mode_extraction — The forward flow of extractable photons from the cavity int...)
      .seq
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [5] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (grid_charged — The affirmative state where usable power successfully flows to...)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑱 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [6] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (metamaterial_composition — The sequential chaining of extraction and stabiliz...)
        (.arrow 𐑗 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [7] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (vacuum_backreaction — The reverse descent of vacuum polarization that stabili...)
      -- F-branch (2 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [8] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (cavity_failure — The negative state where vacuum back-reaction threatens to c...)
        (.arrow 𐑳 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [9] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (zero_point_paradox — The paradice of the vacuum: simultaneously empty of real...))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [10]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑭)  -- [10] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (vacuum_restoration — The recombination of extractable modes and virtual pairs to restore the vacuum state.)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑙 𐑡)  -- [11] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (immutable_ledger — The permanent, append-only record of energy harvested and ...)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑭 𐑼)  -- [12] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (domestic_manifold — The hermetic seal of the home's energy grid that contains...)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def at_home_zero_point_energy_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (at_home_zero_point_energy_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def at_home_zero_point_energy_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (at_home_zero_point_energy_protocol).restrictToEVALF

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem at_home_zero_point_energy_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

-- Frobenius (split → fuse): μ∘δ = id on .prod branch
-- Proof: apply igFrobAlg_self_fusion; exact mu_delta_A_id
-- (requires mu_delta_A_id from IGFunctor library)

end Imscribing
